---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve? Who benefits (EM, Head of Eng, CTO, engineer)?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Area
Which part of the app? (e.g. Delivery ▸ OKRs, People & Org, Finance, a new screen)

## Data source
If this shows new data, how is it entered or ingested? (Remember: every value must
be enterable via a form or an integration — see CONTRIBUTING.md.)

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or examples.
